parameters.query:
SELECT
    d.doc_id,
    COALESCE(d.supplier_name, '— unknown —') AS supplier_name,
    d.subject,
    COALESCE(c.category_nme, '— uncategorised —') AS category,
    ROUND(d.confidence_score::numeric, 2) AS confidence,
    d.total_amount,
    d.document_date,
    CASE WHEN d.fy_year IS NOT NULL THEN 'FY' || d.fy_year ELSE '—' END AS fy_label
FROM core.tax_documents d
LEFT JOIN ref.tax_categories c ON c.category_id = d.tax_category_id
WHERE d.review_status = 'NEEDS_REVIEW'
ORDER BY d.confidence_score ASC, d.document_date DESC;
